experience.title: PhD Researcher
experience.description: Spearheading research on 5G/6G wireless infrastructure, efficient spectrum management, and optimizing O-RAN architecture. Developing novel approaches by integrating Machine Learning techniques—such as Continual and Reinforcement Learning—into physical-layer communications tasks to achieve higher network autonomy.

experience.title: Data Scientist & Engineer
experience.description: Spent seven years driving impact in the telecommunications industry, specializing in large-scale data engineering. Built and maintained critical data infrastructure, developed predictive models, and implemented network optimization algorithms for global enterprise systems handling massive daily throughput.
